basics.name: Aşkın Kadir Çekim
basics.label: Computer Science Student
basics.summary: Computer Science student with a strong foundation in software development, coding since the age of 10. Passionate about building products at the intersection of artificial intelligence, blockchain, and emerging technologies. Experienced in hackathons, mobile and web development, and integrating AI tools into real-world workflows.

work.name: OmmaWorks
work.summary: Business Operations Specialist focused on AI integration and workflow automation
highlights: Researched, evaluated, and integrated AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, and other LLM-based solutions) to improve efficiency across departments
Automated internal workflows by embedding AI-driven solutions into daily operations, increasing team productivity
Structured and optimized the company Knowledge Base using AI-assisted documentation and search capabilities
Developed and maintained BI dashboards (initially with Retool, later with Metabase) incorporating AI-enhanced analytics for data-driven decision-making

education.institution: Private Antalya Final Science High School
Dr. İlhami Tankut Anatolian High School

projects.name: Proactive EV Co-Pilot
projects.description: AI-powered EV itinerary planning assistant for multi-stop routing
highlights: Implemented user preference learning, constraint-aware scoring, and real-time charging insights
Built a full architectural prototype with a Flutter frontend, HERE APIs, a preference-based ranking engine, and an LLM-driven intent parser
Awarded as a winner for innovation in intelligent EV navigation

projects.name: Twinify -- Your AI-Powered Digital Twin for WhatsApp
projects.description: AI-powered digital twin that mirrors personality, voice, and communication style on WhatsApp
highlights: Integrated OpenAI GPT for conversational intelligence, ElevenLabs for realistic voice cloning, and WhatsApp Web.js for messaging
Implemented a SQLite-backed memory layer to preserve long-term context and enable rich, ongoing conversations
Recognized as a winner in the 'Exploratory use of LLMs and Vision models' track at the Nosu AI Hackathon

projects.name: UNITE -- Government Procurement Platform
projects.description: Crisis-time platform to streamline public procurement, acting as an 'Alibaba for government tenders'
highlights: Developed using Node.js to enable efficient tender discovery and matching between governments and suppliers
Achieved 4th place in the #EuVsVirus Hackathon at the age of 14

projects.name: Liberta -- Decentralized Social Media
projects.description: Blockchain-based social media platform focusing on privacy, data ownership, and censorship resistance
highlights: Implemented the frontend using Vue.js and leveraged the NEO N3 blockchain for back-end operations
Provided a decentralized alternative to traditional social media platforms

projects.name: DON8 -- Donation Made Great
projects.description: Cross-platform mobile app to encourage charitable giving through everyday purchases
highlights: Built using Flutter to integrate donations seamlessly into daily life
Focused on use cases in the food and drink sector
